title: Sub-Harness Invocation with Isolation
rationale: Subprocess intrinsic and Pi streaming exist. Remaining work is wiring context isolation and model override per invocation into the existing invoker. The core plumbing is in place.
partialCredit: ~60% done. Types, subprocess.ts, piWrapper subscribe() all exist. Missing: isolation boundaries, background execution with tracking.

title: Process Orchestration with Effect Routing
rationale: capabilityRouter.ts exists but has zero consumers in the orchestration loop. Wiring it into orchestrateIteration.ts requires restructuring the core execution path. Coordinator process template is architectural work.
partialCredit: ~20% done. capabilityRouter and selectionPolicies exist as libraries. Integration into the orchestration loop is the bulk of the work.

title: Built-in Process Templates
rationale: Library/methodologies/ is rich. Remaining work is packaging existing methodology definitions with harness+capability configurations. Mostly configuration, not new code.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Methodology content exists; packaging as templates with harness profiles is the gap.

title: Cross-Run Communication
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires AGENT_MESSAGE journal event type, message routing between runs, and delivery guarantees. Architectural design needed.

title: Cross-Run State Sharing
rationale: SessionContext and SessionHistory already provide cross-run shared knowledge. Remaining work is ensuring automatic persistence across all runs and making state injection seamless.

title: Breakpoint Analytics and SLA Tracking
rationale: Self-contained module. Breakpoint resolution times are already in journal events. Analytics is a read-only aggregation layer.
partialCredit: 0% done but data source (journal events) is available.

title: CC Plugin Compatibility Layer
rationale: Plugin loader, sandbox, and version-check exist. The CC manifest adapter mapping CC hook types to babysitter hook types is the core remaining work. Risk: CC plugin format may evolve, requiring ongoing maintenance.
partialCredit: ~40% done. Plugin infrastructure is solid; CC-specific mapping layer is missing.

title: CC Marketplace Protocol Support
rationale: No implementation exists. CC marketplace protocol is external and may change. Requires reverse-engineering or documentation of CC marketplace API. Unblocks 12 downstream gaps.
partialCredit: 0% done. Babysitter marketplace uses its own format.

title: Plugin Trust, Provenance, and Blocklist
rationale: Plugin sandbox with permission tracking and governance trust-level rules exist. Remaining: blocklist data store and provenance metadata at install time. Small, well-scoped additions.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Foundation exists in sandbox.ts and governance.

title: Plugin Auto-Update and Versioning
rationale: Semver checks and plugin registry with versions exist. Remaining: auto-update mechanism at startup and rollback on failure. Well-scoped.

title: Plugin Validation and Diagnostics
rationale: Plugin loader reads manifests and version-check does compatibility. Remaining: dedicated plugin:validate command and structured error types. Small additions to existing infrastructure.

title: Effect Priority and Scheduling
rationale: parallelStrategies.ts provides strategy patterns and scheduler hints exist. Remaining: priority queue and deadline-based scheduling. Well-bounded scope.
partialCredit: ~30% done. Strategies exist; priority ordering is new.

title: Effect Result Caching and Deduplication
rationale: Within-run deduplication via journal replay and hashInvocationKey exist. Remaining: cross-run cache with TTL. The hash key infrastructure makes this tractable.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Within-run dedup works; cross-run cache is the remaining piece.

title: Cost-Based Routing Policies
rationale: Cost-optimized selection policy, pricing tables, and session budget with alerts exist. Remaining: auto-downgrade wiring when nearing budget limits. Small, focused feature.
partialCredit: ~70% done. Core cost infrastructure is solid.

title: Harness Health Monitoring and Circuit Breaker
rationale: Run-level health scoring exists. Remaining: per-harness health tracking with circuit-breaker pattern (mark unhealthy after N failures, retry after cooldown). Well-bounded pattern.
partialCredit: ~30% done. Health scoring exists but is run-scoped not harness-scoped.

title: JSON Session Management API
rationale: MCP tools expose session_init, session_resume, session_state. Session modules exist in platform. Remaining: unified REST-style session CRUD API matching existing api/ patterns.
partialCredit: ~60% done. Functionally complete via MCP; needs REST API surface.

title: Channel Permission Relay (Breakpoint Approval via Channels)
rationale: ChannelPermissionRelay with racing claim pattern exists. Remaining: wiring into actual breakpoint resolution flow in orchestration loop. Integration work only.

title: Prompt Plan Observability
rationale: Strata model with checksums per section exists. Remaining: instructions:inspect command surfacing the data. CLI command wrapping existing data.

title: Context Introspection
rationale: Post-hoc token analysis and session cost tracking exist. Remaining: real-time rendering surface during active orchestration. Integration into existing dashboard or observer.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Data pipeline complete; rendering surface missing.

title: Analytics and Feature Flags
rationale: Structured JSONL logging and capability collection exist but no analytics platform integration or configurable sinks. Architectural decisions needed for sink pipeline.
partialCredit: ~25% done. Logging exists; evaluation context and sink pipeline are new.

title: Audit Export
rationale: No implementation exists. Journal data is available as raw JSON. Export is a read-only transformation layer. Well-scoped but needs format decisions (JSON, CSV, Markdown).

title: Agent Progress Summarization
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires LLM-based or heuristic summarization of iteration progress. Design decisions needed for summarization strategy.

title: Embedded SDK Dashboard Webhook and Alert System
rationale: Webhook registration types and registry management exist. Remaining: HTTP delivery logic (fetch()) and throttling/deduplication. Well-bounded networking code.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Types and registry in place; delivery missing.

title: Concurrent Effect Execution
rationale: concurrentExecution.ts builds waves and effectGroup.ts creates groups, but orchestrateIteration.ts still processes sequentially. Wiring concurrent execution into the core loop is high-risk architectural work.
partialCredit: ~35% done. Scaffolding exists; core loop integration is the hard part.

title: Multi-Harness Parallel Dispatch
rationale: Execution waves and named groups exist but cross-iteration team coordination is absent. Coordinator process pattern is architecturally complex. Depends on PAR-001 and SUBOBS-002.
partialCredit: ~20% done. Group identity exists; coordination logic is new.

title: Parallel File Operations
rationale: No file batching exists. Constrained by harness architecture -- single-session tools execute sequentially. May require multi-session or worktree approach.
partialCredit: ~10% done. Mostly new work within architectural constraints.

title: Streaming Parallelism
rationale: Pi subscribe() and JournalWatcher exist for observation streaming. Remaining: overlapped tool execution and pipeline parallelism between orchestration phases.
partialCredit: ~20% done. Observation streaming works; execution-level parallelism is new.

title: Fork-Join Process Pattern
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires state inheritance at fork points and synchronization at join points. Blocked by PAR-003. Architecturally complex.

title: Prompt Caching (Ephemeral)
rationale: Strata-aware prompt assembly with stability tags and checksums exists. Remaining: uniform cache_control API integration across adapters. Adapter-by-adapter wiring.
partialCredit: ~60% done. Infrastructure complete; adapter wiring remaining.

title: Session Compaction
rationale: Compaction settings, density-filter, library-cache, and continuity state preservation exist. Remaining: multiple compaction strategies (tool-output summarization, resolved effect pruning) and auto-compact triggers. Strategy design is complex.
partialCredit: ~40% done. Framework exists; core strategies are missing.

title: Streaming Message Rendering
rationale: Pi subscribe() enables streaming for Pi adapter. Remaining: CLI harness streaming (non-Pi) and dashboard rendering. Depends on SUBOBS-001 for output streaming.
partialCredit: ~25% done. Pi streaming works; other harnesses do not stream.

title: Aggressive Parallelism
rationale: Building blocks (waves, strategies, background classification) exist. Remaining: auto-detect independent effects in orchestrateIteration.ts for concurrent execution. Depends on PAR-001.
partialCredit: ~25% done. Detection and wiring are the remaining work.

title: Process Chaining and Pipelines
rationale: SkillChainBuilder provides topological sorting and dependency tracking at skill level. Remaining: full process-level pipelines with typed input/output flow between stages. Upgrade from skill to process level.

title: Process Versioning and Migration
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires version metadata on process definitions, mismatch detection during run resume, and migration strategies. Schema design work.

title: Auto-Configure Orchestration from User Profile
rationale: User and project profile systems exist with prompt rendering. Remaining: wire profile data to auto-configure breakpoint frequency, model selection, and process recommendations. Integration work.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Profiles exist and render; configuration driving is missing.

title: Prompt Inspection Tooling
rationale: Strata metadata with checksums exists. Remaining: instructions:inspect CLI command showing token counts and cache-stability annotations. CLI surface wrapping existing data.

title: Instructions Loaded Hook
rationale: InstructionsLoaded hook exists in CC adapter layer. Remaining: generalize as SDK-level hook type. Small type addition and wiring.

title: Context Compression Families
rationale: Density-filter, library-cache, and strata grouping exist but no semantic family grouping. Requires fundamental design for per-effect/per-file/per-iteration compression families. Depends on PERF-002.
partialCredit: ~15% done. Strata groups by stability, not semantics.

title: Safety and Reversibility Prompt Framework
rationale: criticalRules.ts and nonNegotiables.ts provide safety content. Remaining: dedicated reversibility assessment framework and blast radius reasoning section. Prompt template work.
partialCredit: ~40% done. Safety rules exist; reversibility framework is new.

title: Remote Sessions (WebSocket)
rationale: WebSocket server transport with session multiplexing, auth, rate limiting, and reconnection exist. Remaining: run directory synchronization for remote execution. Significant distributed systems work.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Transport layer complete; directory sync is missing.

title: Host Contract Layer
rationale: Types and validation utility exist (hostContract.ts). Remaining: implement startRun/getStatus/postEffect/subscribe methods and expose via MCP or HTTP. Zero consumers currently.
partialCredit: ~25% done. Types only; no implementation or consumers.

title: Run Comparison and Diffing
rationale: No implementation exists. Self-contained module reading existing journal data. Well-bounded scope.

title: Run Archival and Restore
rationale: No implementation exists. Only cleanup.ts exists. Archival is a storage concern with well-defined scope.

title: Run Forking and Branching
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires journal fork-from-point capability. ReplayEngine only replays from start. Blocked by STATE-006. Architecturally complex.

title: Trust Classes for Plugins
rationale: Plugin sandbox with permission tracking and governance sandbox policy exist. Remaining: TrustLevel as first-class registry field with hook dispatch gating. Small type addition and wiring.

title: OAuth Integration
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires full OAuth flow, credential storage, token refresh. Security-sensitive. May share infrastructure with MCP Authentication (TOOLS-032).

title: Privacy Settings
rationale: Only BABYSITTER_ALLOW_SECRET_LOGS env var exists. Requires PII filtering, data retention policies, field redaction. Cross-cutting concern.

title: Session Templates and Presets
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires SessionTemplate type and .a5c/session-templates/ directory. Well-scoped schema and storage design.

title: Session Sharing and Collaboration
rationale: No implementation exists. Blocked by REMOTE-003. Requires session export/import and multi-operator access. Distributed systems complexity.

title: Long-Term Memory Extraction
rationale: memoryExtraction.ts provides extraction, persistence, querying, and pruning. Remaining: prompt section that renders long-term memories into new run prompts. Small integration piece.
partialCredit: ~80% done. Extraction pipeline complete; prompt injection missing.

title: Memory Consolidation
rationale: No implementation exists. Blocked by STATE-001 (needs prompt injection first). Requires merge, prune, and weight logic for extracted memories.

title: Session Rewind and History
rationale: No implementation exists. ReplayEngine replays from start only. Journal fork-from-point requires new replay architecture. Blocked by PROC-003.

title: Streaming Output Capture from Invoked Harnesses
rationale: Pi adapter already streams via subscribe(). JournalWatcher provides incremental events. Remaining: pipe stdout/stderr from CLI harness child processes in real-time. Node.js child process streaming is well-understood.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Pi streaming works; CLI harness streaming is the remaining gap.

title: Subagent Progress Tracking
rationale: BackgroundEffectStatus and BackgroundProcessRegistry track lifecycle states. Remaining: progress percentage extraction, ETA estimation from streaming output. Depends on SUBOBS-001.
partialCredit: ~40% done. Lifecycle tracking exists; granular progress is new.

title: Subagent Health and Timeout Monitoring
rationale: backgroundTracker tracks timed_out state. processControl provides cancel with grace period. Remaining: hang detection based on output silence and auto-recovery (retry/fallback).
partialCredit: ~40% done. Timeout and cancel exist; hang detection and recovery are new.

title: Embedded SDK Dashboard Subagent Drill-Down
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Original spec assumes embedded SDK dashboard that was never built. Architecture has evolved to observer-dashboard and tula-ui. Cannot estimate until respecified.

title: JS/TS REPL Tool
rationale: Self-contained agentic tool. Python and bash tools exist as patterns. Straightforward implementation.

title: LSP Integration for Code-Aware Routing
rationale: No implementation exists. LSP client module is architecturally significant. Language server lifecycle management, diagnostic consumption, and routing integration are complex.

title: Git Worktree Isolation for Parallel Effect Execution
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires worktree manager, lifecycle management, and integration with parallel execution. Blocked by PAR-001. Git worktree operations are tricky on Windows.

title: Multi-Step Workflow Composition Within Effects
rationale: Subprocess intrinsic and SkillChainBuilder exist as building blocks. Remaining: ctx.workflow() intrinsic with conditional branching, retry policies, step-to-step data transformation. Architectural design work.

title: Structured User Interaction from Within Effects
rationale: InteractionKind and AskUserQuestion with simple/structured modes exist at tool level. Remaining: ctx.ask() intrinsic in processContext for dispatching interaction effects. Mirrors existing intrinsic patterns.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Tool-level interaction exists; effect-level intrinsic is missing.

title: Sleep/Delay Effect Enhancement
rationale: sleepUntil intrinsic exists. Remaining: ctx.sleep(duration) for relative delays, ctx.waitFor(condition), ctx.retryWithBackoff(). Small intrinsic additions.

title: Structured Output Tool
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires typed output block system (code, image, table, diff, file, markdown). Blocked by UX-001b and UX-001d for rendering.

title: MCP Resource Browsing and Reading
rationale: MCP client manager can connect to servers. Remaining: two agentic tools (mcp_list_resources, mcp_read_resource). Small, well-scoped additions.
partialCredit: ~60% done. Infrastructure exists; tool definitions are missing.

title: MCP Authentication
rationale: No implementation exists. Requires OAuth flow, mcp:auth command, token storage, and refresh lifecycle. Security-sensitive. Shares concerns with SEC-006.

title: Fetch Content Processing
rationale: Fetch tool has url/timeout/raw only. Remaining: prompt parameter for LLM-based content processing. Well-scoped enhancement to existing tool.

title: Plugin Management Integration
rationale: Plugin CLI commands, loader, and sandbox exist. Remaining: plugin discovery as agentic tool and marketplace browsing during orchestration. Incremental additions to existing system.

title: Ink/React Terminal Rendering Foundation
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Architecture evolved to tula-ui and observer-dashboard. Original 'Ink in SDK' assumption is outdated. Cannot estimate until rendering target is decided.

title: Effect Tree Visualization
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Depends on UX-001 which itself needs respec. The rendering target has changed from 'Ink component' assumption.

title: Structured Diff Rendering
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Same rendering target issue as UX-001. Diff rendering logic is well-understood; platform choice is the uncertainty.

title: Permission and Breakpoint Approval UI
rationale: askUserQuestion.ts provides interactive prompts. interactionRouter.ts maps kinds to UX hints. Remaining: rich context display with risk visualization and auto-approval recommendations.
partialCredit: ~50% done. Basic interaction works; rich display is missing.

title: Message Type Rendering
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Same as UX-001. Type-specific rendering depends on chosen rendering platform.

title: Progress and Status Line
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. High value, small effort once rendering target is decided. Blocked on UX-001 architectural decision.

title: Streaming Output Panels
rationale: NEEDS_RESPEC. Same as UX-001. Streaming output display depends on both rendering target and SUBOBS-001.

title: Resume Dashboard
rationale: Session discovery, continuity state, and continuity overlay exist. Remaining: visual run picker and TUI-based resume selection. Data layer is complete.

title: Failure Triage View
rationale: Health detection and error analysis exist (health.ts, errorSuggestions.ts, errorTemplates.ts). Remaining: synthesized triage view combining these into actionable output.

title: Typed Effect Interaction Patterns
rationale: InteractionKind with 5 types and AskUserQuestion with modes exist. Remaining: full typed interaction schemas as effect types with harness-specific renderers. Schema design and multi-harness rendering.

title: Command Discoverability
rationale: CLI --help, MCP skill_discover, and operatorCommands exist. Remaining: babysitter help --search and contextual suggestions. Small CLI enhancement.
